title: WEST Act of 2025
plain_summary: The WEST Act of 2025 is a bill that would cancel a rule made by the Bureau of Land Management in April 2023. The rule was about protecting nature and keeping the land healthy. If this bill becomes a law, that rule would no longer be allowed to be used or enforced. This means the government agency would not be able to follow those conservation rules anymore.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.

sections.title: Section 1  Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Western Economic Security Today Act of two thousand twenty-five or the WEST Act of two thousand twenty-five.

sections.title: Section 2  Withdrawal of BLM Rule
sections.text: The final rule that came from a proposed rule by the Bureau of Land Management called Conservation and Landscape Health that was published on April third two thousand twenty-three will have no power and cannot be enforced. The Bureau of Land Management is the government agency that manages public lands.
